events.title: Design Systems Meetup
events.description: Monthly design systems meetup featuring lightning talks from senior designers. Topics include tokens, components, and scaling design systems at enterprise.
events.relevanceReason: Solid content on design systems. Broadly useful for your design engineering work.

events.title: Razorpay Design + AI Meetup
events.description: Panel discussion on AI-assisted design workflows featuring designers from Razorpay, Figma, and Linear. Learn how teams are integrating AI tools into daily design work.
events.relevanceReason: You literally attended their last session — the follow-up on AI integration is a must. Bangalore-based, matches your location.

events.title: LLM Fine-tuning Workshop
events.description: Practical workshop on fine-tuning Claude and open-source LLMs for production use cases. Covers data preparation, training workflows, evaluation metrics, and deployment.
events.relevanceReason: Production-focused LLM training — good depth on topics you've been exploring.

events.title: Remotion Workshop: Motion Graphics with React
events.description: Hands-on 3-hour workshop on Remotion — build programmatic motion graphics using React. Perfect for design engineers moving into generative media.
events.relevanceReason: This is your exact focus area — motion graphics + React + design engineering. Don't miss.

events.title: Building Agentic AI Systems with Claude
events.description: Learn how to design autonomous AI agents that can perform complex tasks. Hands-on workshop walking through Claude API, tool use, planning loops, and approval gates. Discovered from a LinkedIn post by @anthropic-design.
events.relevanceReason: Covers agentic AI patterns with Claude — directly aligned with your shift to design engineering. Razorpay-style hands-on session.

events.title: Frontend UG: React Server Components
events.description: Local frontend user group meetup. Deep dive into React Server Components with live coding and architecture discussion.
events.relevanceReason: Frontend tech is adjacent to your work. Could be useful, but not a priority.

events.title: AI Design Systems Panel
events.description: Panel featuring design leaders from Figma, Linear, and Anthropic on how AI is reshaping design workflows, quality assurance, and design tokens.
events.relevanceReason: Great speaker lineup. Figma + Linear + Anthropic on design + AI intersection.

events.title: React Motion Lab
events.description: Workshop on advanced React animation patterns using Framer Motion and Spring. Build interactive prototypes from scratch.
events.relevanceReason: Motion + React combo — complementary skill for your design engineering path.

events.title: Claude Agent SDK Deep Dive
events.description: Technical deep-dive on the Claude Agent SDK. Learn how to build production AI agents with tool use, memory, and state management.
events.relevanceReason: Direct from Anthropic — best source for agentic AI patterns with Claude.
